results.rendered_html:
calita p. p. [cal-kta]
1 Shaken, moved, stirred, agitated.
2 Gone, departed; evamuktvā sa calitaḥ.
3 Attained.
4 Known, understood.
5 Removed, displaced. (see cal).
— taṃ
1 Shaking, moving.
2 Going,
(pb) walking.
3 A kind of dance; calitaṃ nāma nāṭyamaṃtaraṃṇa  M. 1.
